rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. DOLE PLANTATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joint Motion And Joint Motion To Approve Pro 65 Settlement And To Enter Stip And [Proposed] Order Re: Consent Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, OCTOBER 1, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Joint Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And To Enter Stip And Order Re: Consent Judgment. A hearing is required to discuss viability of post-sale warning provision. =(302/PJB)

rulings.Case Title: REGINA M. THOMSON VS. THOMAS HARRIS
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, OCTOBER 1, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT THOMAS HARRIS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant has failed to show that plaintiff cannot prove her case and plaintiff's declaration and deposition testimony raises triable issues of material fact. =(302/PJB/VC)

rulings.Case Title: NEIL ADAMS VS. CORT BUSINESS SERVICES CORPORATION et al

rulings.Case Title: GHULAM JANJUA VS. TAMARA OCANAN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, OCTOBER 1, 2007, LINE 13. PLAINTIFF GHULAM JANJUA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant's declaration raises triable issues of material fact as to the existence of a nuisance, the rent due, and affirmative defenses of retaliation, harrassment, and breach of warranty of habitability. =(302/PJB/xDD)
